paragraphs.content: I’m a Fullstack Software Engineer with a degree in Computer Science and 4+ years of experience building scalable, high‑performance solutions.
I’ve worked on web applications, robust backends, modern frontends, and mobile apps, focusing on solid architecture, clean code, and performance—from business rules to the final UI.
I take a product‑oriented approach, prioritizing scalability, maintainability, and engineering best practices such as clean architecture, automated testing, and solid development standards.
I’m passionate about technology and driven by curiosity. I’m always exploring new tools, following market trends, and growing technically to deliver more efficient, innovative solutions.
My goal is to turn ideas into well‑structured, performant digital products ready to scale.
